claim: Cognee's knowledge-graph builder running on Llama 3.1 8B Q4 produces >=80% hallucinated graph nodes (factually wrong edges, fabricated entities), confirming Cognee's own docs that recommend deepseek-r1:32b or Llama 3.3 70B and not smaller. This disqualifies Cognee for OCM's small-model default but documents the limit.
source_for_claim: Cognee documentation: deepseek-r1:32b or Llama 3.3 70B required for stable graph construction. Research note observation that 8B produces ~90% hallucinated nodes informally.
comparison_anchor: retrieval/cognee-32b-graph-quality (when implemented; same workload on the recommended model)
decision_rule: CONFIRMED is the EXPECTED outcome — vindicates the v0.4 row decision NOT to ship Cognee in v1. REFUTED would prompt reconsidering Cognee for small-model setups.
blocked_on: Cognee not packaged in OCM (and intentionally won't be in v1)
Wikipedia-bio workload not yet packaged in bench/workloads/
